Title: User Registration
Preconditions: User is not registered.
Test Data: Valid email, password, and personal information.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the registration page.
2. Enter the required personal information.
3. Enter a valid email address.
4. Enter a valid password.
5. Confirm the password.
6. Click the "Register" button.
Expected Result: The user should be successfully registered and receive a confirmation email.

Title: User Login
Preconditions: User is registered.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page.
2. Enter the email address.
3. Enter the password.
4. Click the "Login" button.
Expected Result: The user should be successfully logged in and redirected to the dashboard.

Title: Add Plant
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Data: Valid plant name, species, location, and image.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the "Add Plant" page.
2. Enter the plant name.
3. Enter the plant species.
4. Enter the plant location.
5. Upload a valid image of the plant.
6. Click the "Add Plant" button.
Expected Result: The plant should be successfully added to the user's profile.

Title: Diary
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the diary page.
2. Enter a valid diary entry.
3. Click the "Save" button.
Expected Result: The diary entry should be successfully saved and displayed on the diary page.

Title: Modify Profile
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the "Modify Profile" page.
2. Update the personal information.
3. Click the "Save" button.
Expected Result: The personal information should be successfully updated.

Title: Add Plant
Preconditions: The user has an account
Test Steps:
1. The user navigates to the plant addition screen
2. The user enters the plant information
3. The user clicks the "Add Plant" button
Expected Result: The plant is added to the user's diary.

Title: View Plants
Preconditions: The user has added plants
Test Steps:
1. The user navigates to the plant list screen
2. The user views the list of plants
Expected Result: The user can see the list of plants they are caring for.

Title: View Plant Details
Preconditions: The user has added a plant
Test Steps:
1. The user selects a plant from the plant list
2. The user is redirected to the plant details screen
3. The user views the plant image and information
Expected Result: The user can see the details of the selected plant.

Title: Plant Analysis
Preconditions: The user has an account
Test Steps:
1. The user navigates to the plant analysis screen
2. The user takes a photo of the plant
3. The user clicks the "Analyze" button
Expected Result: The application diagnoses the plant's health and provides recommendations for care.

Title: View Profile
Preconditions: The user has an account
Test Steps:
1. The user navigates to the profile screen
2. The user views their account information
Expected Result: The user can see their account details.

Title: Modify Profile
Preconditions: User has an account
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the profile page.
2. User clicks on the "Edit Profile" button.
3. User modifies the personal data.
4. User clicks on the "Save" button.
Expected Result: The user's personal data is updated in the database.

Title: Change Password
Preconditions: User has an account
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the profile page.
2. User clicks on the "Change Password" button.
3. User enters the new password.
4. User confirms the new password.
5. User clicks on the "Save" button.
Expected Result: The user's password is updated in the database.

Title: User Login
Preconditions: User has an account
Test Steps:
1. User opens the application.
2. User enters the email and password.
3. User clicks on the "Login" button.
Expected Result: User is logged in and can access the application.

Title: Plant Analysis
Preconditions: User has a plant
Test Steps:
1. User opens the application.
2. User takes a picture of the plant.
3. User clicks on the "Analyze" button.
Expected Result: The application identifies the plant and provides detailed information about it, such as its name, type, planting period, light and watering needs. The application also provides specific care instructions for the plant.

Title: System Performance
Preconditions: The system is running on a target device.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Perform various operations on the application.
3. Monitor the system's performance.
Expected Result: The system's performance should meet the requirements stated on page 25.

Title: System Usability
Preconditions: The system is running on a target device.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Navigate through the application's interface.
3. Attempt to complete various tasks.
Expected Result: The system should be intuitive and easy to use, as stated on page 26.

Title: System Robustness
Preconditions: The system is running on a target device.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Intentionally introduce errors or edge cases.
3. Monitor the system's behavior.
Expected Result: The system should operate as expected, even in the presence of errors or edge cases, as stated on page 26.

Title: System Portability
Preconditions: The system is running on a target device.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Check the compatibility of the application with Android 8.1 and later versions.
Expected Result: The application should be compatible with Android 8.1 and later versions, as stated on pages 29 and 30.

Title: Database Performance
Preconditions: The system is running on a target device with an internet connection.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Perform various operations that require database access.
3. Monitor the database's performance.
Expected Result: The database should respond quickly, as stated on pages 28 and 29.

Title: Internet Connection
Preconditions: The system is running on a device with an internet connection.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Monitor the application's behavior during normal usage.
Expected Result: The application should function correctly with a stable internet connection, as stated on page 29.

Title: Create Account
Preconditions: Application must be installed correctly on the mobile device.
Test Steps:
1. Open the application.
2. Select the option to create a new account.
3. Enter the required information (username, email, password).
4. Confirm the account creation.
Expected Result: The user is able to create a new account and navigate within the application.

Title: View Profile
Preconditions: User must be registered and have an active internet connection.
Test Steps:
1. Log in to the application.
2. Navigate to the profile section.
3. Verify that the user's information (username, email, password) is displayed.
Expected Result: The user has visualized their profile information and can navigate through the various sections of the profile.

Title: Modify Profile
Preconditions: User must be registered, have an active internet connection, and be logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Log in to the application.
2. Navigate to the profile section.
3. Select the option to modify the profile information.
4. Enter the new information and confirm the changes.
Expected Result: The user has visualized their profile information and has successfully modified their information.

Title: Login
Preconditions: Application must be installed and the user must be registered.
Test Steps:
1. Open the application.
2. Select the option to log in.
3. Enter the registered email and password.
4. Confirm the login.
Expected Result: The user is authenticated and redirected to the main screen of the application.

Title: Logout
Preconditions: User must be connected to the application.
Test Steps:
1. Log in to the application.
2. Navigate to any section of the application.
3. Select the option to log out.
Expected Result: The user is no longer connected to the application.

Title: Analyze Plant
Preconditions: User must have access to the application and a device with a camera.
Test Steps:
1. Open the application.
2. Navigate to the plant analysis section.
3. Take a photo of the plant.
4. Wait for the analysis results.
Expected Result: The user receives information about the plant, including its type and care instructions.

Title: Add Plant
Preconditions: User must have access to the application, have photographed the plant, and be logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Log in to the application.
2. Navigate to the plant management section.
3. Select the option to add a new plant.
4. Upload the photo of the plant.
5. Confirm the addition of the plant.
Expected Result: The plant is added to the user's profile and a personalized database of plants is created.

Title: Detect Disease
Preconditions: User must be connected to the application, have logged in, and have photographed a plant.
Test Steps:
1. Log in to the application.
2. Navigate to the plant analysis section.
3. Take a photo of the plant.
4. Wait for the analysis results.
Expected Result: The user receives advice on how to care for the plant, including information on any diseases or issues that may be present.

Title: Personal Diary
Preconditions: User must have access to the application, have logged in, and have photographed a plant.
Test Steps:
1. Log in to the application.
2. Navigate to the plant management section.
3. Take a photo of the plant and add it to the diary.
Expected Result: The plant is added to the user's personal diary with the date of planting. The user can view all plants in their diary with their respective names and planting dates.
